message:
test: add comprehensive transformer embedder unit tests

Adds tests/transformer_embedders.rs with 38 tests covering:
- Constants validation (model names, dimensions, registry)
- Model loading and error handling
- Semantic quality tests (related vs unrelated text similarity)
- L2 normalization verification
- Batch processing consistency
- Thread safety and determinism
- Edge cases (emoji, unicode, special chars, empty text)
- Mean pooling behavior verification
- MRL support detection
- Performance benchmarks (latency, batch efficiency)

10 unit tests run without model files; 28 integration tests
properly marked with #[ignore = "requires model files"].

Part of bd-25z8: Unit tests for transformer embedder backends

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
